mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_report ( member_idx, author_name, publisher, report_text, rbook_title, report_title, report_regdate ) VALUES ( #{member_idx}, #{author_name}, #{publisher}, #{report_text}, #{rbook_title},#{report_title}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book_report ORDER BY report_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE book_report SET author_name = #{author_name}, publisher = #{publisher}, report_text = #{report_text}, rbook_title = #{rbook_title}, report_title = #{report_title} WHERE report_id = #{report_id}
